faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear your doubts before getting started

items.question: How long does the complete process take?
items.answer: Essential Website: 7-10 business days after content approval. Managed Automation: 10-14 business days for complete setup.

items.question: Do I need to know technology to have a website?
items.answer: No. With the Essential package, we provide 1h of training for basic content management. With Managed, we handle everything for you — you just need to send us text/images when you want to update something.

items.question: What happens after the 1st month of included support (Essential)?
items.answer: The site is yours and stays online for free on Vercel. If you need additional support, we offer packages: €60/hour (ad-hoc) or pre-paid packages with discount.

items.question: Can I change my package later?
items.answer: Yes! If you start with Essential and want to upgrade to Managed, we credit your initial investment (€300 is deducted from the €800 setup). Migration is free.

items.question: How does cancellation of the Managed package work?
items.answer: You can cancel with 30 days notice. Your plan and respective automations end at the end of the last billed period.

items.question: What are "operations" in the Managed package?
items.answer: Each automatic interaction (e.g., form submitted, automatic email, Google Sheets update) consumes 1 operation. 2,500/month equals ~20 interactions/day, sufficient for most local businesses. We monitor usage and notify you if you're near the limit.

items.question: What if I exceed 2,500 operations?
items.answer: We notify you when you reach 80% of the limit. You have two options: upgrade to a higher plan or add +€30 per 1,000 extra operations. Occasional spikes are tolerated (fair use).

items.question: Do you only work in Lisbon?
items.answer: No. We work with clients throughout Portugal and also internationally (support in Portuguese and English). Online or in-person meetings (Lisbon area).

items.question: How do automations work in practice?
items.answer: Essential: Direct buttons (WhatsApp, phone) and forms that send email. Managed: Complete flows — e.g., form → Telegram notification → Google Sheets entry → automatic client email → follow-up reminder.

items.question: Do I own the website and domain?
items.answer: Yes, in both packages. The developed source code is always yours. The domain is registered in your name. Important note: Automations are linked to our Make.com/Zapier accounts. If you cancel Managed, the basic site remains functional, but you lose the automatic features.

essential.title: Essential
essential.description: Required for basic site functionality (session, security). Cannot be disabled.

marketing.title: Marketing

chatbot.title: Speak Easy
chatbot.greeting:
Hello! I'm Speak Easy, Re-Evolution's assistant 🤖

How can I help you today?

You can ask about:
• Services and pricing
• How automations work
• Project examples
• Schedule a free diagnosis

responses.price: Our packages start at €300 (Essential), €600 (Automation) and €1,200 (Complete). All include 6 months of support. Would you like to schedule a free diagnosis to receive a personalized proposal?
responses.automation: Automations work like this: when something happens on your site (like filling a form), automatic actions are triggered - sending emails, saving data to Google Sheets and notifying via Telegram/WhatsApp. All without lifting a finger! Want to know more?
responses.time: The complete process takes between 1 to 3 weeks, from first contact to launch. We always start with a free diagnosis. Want to schedule yours?
responses.portfolio: We've developed projects for restaurants, lawyers and other local businesses, with results like +40% reservations and 70% more qualified leads. You can see the details in the Portfolio section above!
responses.default: Great question! To better answer, I'd like to speak with you directly. You can fill out the quick diagnosis or chat on WhatsApp!

data_collected.title: 1. Data We Collect
data_collected.content:
Identification data: name, email, phone — only when you voluntarily submit forms.
Browsing data (with consent): pages visited, session duration, traffic source, via Google Analytics 4 (anonymised IP).
Advertising data (with consent): interactions with Google Ads to measure campaign effectiveness.
Technical cookies: essential to site functionality, no personal identification.

data_usage.title: 2. How We Use Data
data_usage.content:
Responding to contact and free diagnosis requests.
Improving website performance and experience.
Anonymous traffic analysis (Google Analytics 4).
Measuring and optimising advertising campaigns (Google Ads, when active).
Internal notifications about new contacts (Telegram, internal use only).

data_sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing and International Transfers
data_sharing.content:
We do not sell your data. We only share with:
• Google LLC (Analytics + Ads) — servers in the USA; transfer under EU Standard Contractual Clauses. Privacy policy: policies.google.com/privacy
• Make.com — automations, encrypted data, EU servers
• Vercel Inc. — hosting, USA and EU servers
• MXRoute — email delivery, USA servers
All transfers outside the EU are carried out with appropriate safeguards under GDPR.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.content:
Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
• Access the data we hold about you
• Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
• Delete your data ('right to be forgotten')
• Withdraw consent at any time (without affecting prior processing)
• Data portability
• Lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority

To exercise these rights: geral@re-evolution.pt
We will respond within 30 days.

cookies_section.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies_section.content:
We use three categories of cookies:

🔒 Essential (always active)
Required for basic site functionality. Without these, the site cannot operate correctly.

📊 Analytics (require consent)
Google Analytics 4 — measures user behaviour anonymously (no personal identification). Data retention: 14 months.

📣 Marketing (require consent)
Google Ads — used to measure advertising campaign effectiveness and show relevant ads. Data retention: per Google policy.

We implement Google Consent Mode v2, ensuring no tracking cookies are activated without your explicit consent. You can change your preferences at any time via the cookie banner.

security.title: 6. Security and Data Retention
security.content: All communications are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. Data stored on certified servers (Vercel, Google Cloud). Form data retained as long as necessary to respond to your request. Anonymised analytics data retained for 14 months in Google Analytics.

contact_section.title: 7. Data Controller and Contact
contact_section.content:
Re-Evolution, Digital Services
Pct. José Régio nº5, 2º Dto, 2790-092 Carnaxide, Oeiras, Portugal
geral@re-evolution.pt
+351 969 063 633

For privacy-related questions or to exercise your GDPR rights, please contact us at the email above.
